thoughts_readmemd_350614414745.content: Comment text differs across artifacts: task.md specifies 'kody observability smoke 0.4.0 2026-04-17' but the build stage plan uses 'observability-smoke-0.4.0'. Ensure the exact string from task.md is

thoughts_git_507346727339.content: Build stage reported successful edit but git diff shows zero changes — always verify actual committed diff, not just stage logs.

facts_edit_verification_507348225180.content: A failed edit silently succeeds if the file content already matches the intended change — verify with git diff to confirm actual modification.

thoughts_pipeline_execution_574003427979.content: A build stage reporting success does not guarantee the edit was committed — check the actual diff in the review stage

facts_smoke_test_tasks_574004771412.content: When the task is a single-line append, verify the file was modified before assuming the pipeline succeeded
